courses.title: Global Art History: Prehistoric to 600 CE

fnar-studio.label: Studio Art Requirement
fnar-studio.note: One studio art course: Drawing I, Painting I, Ceramics, Sculpture Foundations, or related

fnar-early-modern.label: Early Modern Art
fnar-early-modern.note: One course in medieval, baroque, or early renaissance art

fnar-non-western.label: Non-Western Art
fnar-non-western.note: Two courses: Latin American, Islamic, African, South Asian, Chinese, or Japanese art

fnar-modern-western.label: Modern Art and Western Traditions
fnar-modern-western.note: One course such as Women/Art/Society, Paris in the Nineteenth Century, or Contemporary Art
